title: Permission to prevent manual drag & drops of items
excerpt:

posts.author: ilariatottolo2 (ilaria)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m wondering if an account permission exists for which the manual drag and drop of items in a board can be forbidden.

We have use cases in which guests (or could be a member) should not be able to manually move items within the board.

As far as the board settings, by selecting the “Only edit items or subitems that users are assigned to” permission prevents users from dragging and dropping items, but it also disables the “create item” button.

Ideally, the functionality should have a distinction so to keep the “create item” button active on the board and disable the ability to drag and drop items.

Hopefully, this could be feasible in the near future!

Thanks!
